pageDescription: Calculate cubic yards for concrete, soil, and other materials with precise measurements for construction and landscaping projects

conversion.title: Volume Conversions
conversion.description: 1 cubic yard = 27 cubic feet = 0.764555 cubic meters

materials.title: Common Material Densities
materials.description: Concrete: 4,050 lbs/yd³, Soil: 2,200 lbs/yd³, Mulch: 500 lbs/yd³

ordering.title: Ordering Materials
ordering.description: Add 10-15% extra to account for waste and settling

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides volume calculations only
criticalWarningsList.accuracy: Measure accurately and add extra for waste and settling

importantNotesList: Always measure twice and order extra material to account for waste
Consider material compaction and settling in your calculations
Check local suppliers for material availability and delivery options
Factor in transportation and handling when planning your project

messages.enterInformation: Enter your dimensions to calculate cubic yards
messages.resultMessage: Your cubic yard calculation is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides volume calculations based on standard geometric formulas. Actual material requirements may vary based on project specifics, waste factors, and supplier recommendations.

seekHelp.title: Construction Resources
seekHelp.content: For professional construction advice and material estimation, consult construction professionals or your local material suppliers for project-specific recommendations.

tooltips.shape: Select the shape of the area you're measuring
tooltips.width: Width of the area (perpendicular to length)
tooltips.height: Depth or height of the material needed
tooltips.material: Type of material affects weight calculations

select_shape_and_enter_dimensions_to_cal: Select shape and enter dimensions to calculate volume
k_1_cubic_yard_27_cubic_feet_46656_cubic: 1 cubic yard = 27 cubic feet = 46,656 cubic inches
commonly_used_for_concrete_gravel_soil_m: Commonly used for concrete, gravel, soil, mulch, and other construction materials.
select_shape_enter_dimensions_and_click_: Select shape, enter dimensions and click
cubic_yards_are_the_standard_unit_for_me:
Cubic yards are the standard unit for measuring bulk construction materials like concrete,
                        gravel, soil, and mulch. This unit provides a practical scale for construction projects and
                        material ordering.
always_divide_cubic_feet_by_27_to_get_cu: Always divide cubic feet by 27 to get cubic yards.
k_1_cubic_yard_27_cubic_feet_46656_cubic: 1 cubic yard = 27 cubic feet = 46,656 cubic inches
